pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J. It's a bit of a squeeze in here with everyone waiting, isn't it? What's your name, and what brings you to a game like this?
Hey J, I'm C. It’s definitely a squeeze in here. Honestly, I’m just here to win some money for the people I care about back home—I'm pretty determined to take something back for them. How about you?
I'm in the exact same boat, C—I’ve got people counting on me back home, so I'm definitely here to win.
Glad we're on the same page. It definitely adds a lot of pressure when it's not just for yourself, doesn't it?
It really does. It’s a lot to carry, but it’s also what’s keeping me focused on winning.
I hear you. That drive can be a real edge. Do you have any idea what kind of game we're actually looking at yet?
Not a clue, honestly. I just know there's a shared prize pool and things are probably going to get pretty competitive once we start.
Definitely. Money has a way of making things intense, but I'm ready for whatever they throw at us.
I like that confidence. Let's just hope there's enough in that pool for both of us to head home happy.
I hope so too. It'd be great if we could both walk away with what we need. Good luck out there, J.
Thanks, C. Good luck to you too—I really hope we both make it happen.
